title: Transfer.sh - Share files from the command line
author: Michael Crump
summary: Transfer files from one Linux system to another I recently ran into a situation where I needed to transfer files from a Linux system to a Windows box but didn’t have access to create a RDP session or SSH tunnel. I was looking for a solution and remembered that I could use https://transfer.sh/ to do it. Basically on the Linux…
